markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy artifacts and initial topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Narrative Refined:** The core narrative was restructured to reflect Read AI's three pillars (Meeting Note-taking, Enterprise Search, AI Assistant), correcting the initial strategy's focus on the desktop app as a product, not a channel.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**Brand Voice Clarified:** The brand voice was defined as "jargon-free" and focused on showing tangible outcomes, not just features. Writing examples will be updated to be more concise.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Presented:** GrowthX proposed 8 topic clusters to build an organic content engine from scratch, targeting SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Immediate Priority:** Content supporting next week's launch of Android, Windows, and Mac apps will be prioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Artifacts

  - [GrowthX shared three artifacts to guide content creation:](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Company Context:** Defines how the AI platform (Atlas) describes Read AI.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prevents the AI from pulling outdated info (e.g., "meeting note-taker") from third-party sources.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Audience Personas:** Defines target user segments.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
          - [**Feedback:** Sarah will facilitate review by Read AI's head of research, as the company has not yet formally defined these personas.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [**Writing Guidelines:** Defines brand voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
          - [**Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
              - [**Voice:** Refined from "pragmatic" to "jargon-free" and "understandable."](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
              - [**Tone:** Must show tangible outcomes and value, not just features.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
              - [**Examples:** "Good" examples are too long; they must be concise.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Product Narrative & Core Capabilities

  - [The initial strategy's product narrative was corrected to align with Read AI's current positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**Core Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
    1.  [Meeting Note-taking](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
    2.  [Enterprise Search](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
    3.  [AI Assistant](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [**Clarifications:**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [**Desktop App:** A channel for accessibility (alongside web, iOS, Android), not a core product.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Digital Twin:** A feature of the AI Assistant, not a standalone pillar. It is in quiet beta, launching publicly in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX presented 8 topic clusters to build an organic content engine from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [The initial analysis focused on Otter, Fireflies, and others.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [**Action:** Add **Glean** to the analysis, as they have strong content.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [**The 8 Topic Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
    1.  [**Meeting Notes & Transcription:** Foundational content targeting top SEO and LLM rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
    2.  [**AI Meeting Assistant Comparisons:** Commercial content using a product feature matrix for consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
    3.  [**Enterprise Search & Knowledge Management:** Content to establish Read AI's authority in this space.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
    4.  **Platform-Specific Integrations:** Content for users of specific platforms (e.g., Zoom, Slack).
          - [**Priority:** Create content for next week's launch of **Android, Windows, and Mac apps**.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
    5.  [**Use Cases & Personas:** Content for bottom-up adoption (e.g., sales, product, HR).](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
    6.  [**AI & Automation Education:** Content to position Read AI as an authoritative source on workplace AI.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
    7.  [**Productivity & Time Management:** Content on saving time and improving meeting efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
    8.  [**Security, Privacy & Compliance:** Content on topics like HIPAA and GDPR, tailored by vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to reflect feedback (jargon-free, outcome-focused, concise examples).](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [Add Glean to the competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Prioritize content for the upcoming Android, Windows, and Mac app launches.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for the 8 topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [Share the Notion strategy doc link in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [**Sarah (Read AI):**](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Facilitate review of the Audience Personas artifact by Read AI's head of research.](https://fathom.video/share/7QfB1HVAoQL8nJkssX74iRtLdUh4USv7?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
